lifecycleScripts.afterStart: npx wp-env run cli wp --info 2>&1 | head -5; echo '---'; npx wp-env run cli wp core version

_note: Runs your plugin against the latest WordPress RC / trunk build. Use BEFORE a new WP stable release ships, so you know if your plugin breaks on the upcoming version. Symlink this as .wp-env.json then: npx wp-env start
